Hi Luis Miguel, Here is your bank statement for your personal goal named Iphone 16 from 2025-12-01 to 2025-12-31. You can view the document using an app that can read PDF files. View your bank statement by opening the attached file and entering your password. Your password is your last name(in lower case), followed by the last 4 digits of your Maya Savings account number, followed by your date of birth in this format: YYYYMMDD. Please note that the password is case- sensitive. For example: if your account number ends in 1234 and your last name is Balmaceda and date of birth is 26 Feb, 1988, your password should be balmaceda123419880226. If you have questions, call our hotline (+632) 8845-77-88, toll-free 1-800-1084- 57788, or *788 using your Smart number. You can also email support@mayabank.ph. Maya Bank, Inc. Good day I decided to contact you in good faith, believing that you will not betray me. I have been in search of someone with the same last name of our late customer and close friend of mine (Mr. Lim ), hence i contacted you because both of you bear the same surname and coincidentally from the same country Philippines and i was pushed to contact you and see how best we can assist each other. Meanwhile I am Dr David Roland, a reputable banker here in New York, United State of America. On the 15 march 2007, the young millionaire (Mr. Lim ) a citizen of your country and crude oil dealer made a fixed deposit with my bank, valued at US$3,500,000.00 (Three million, five hundred thousand US dollars) and the mature date for this deposit contract was on 30th of November, 2014. But sadly, he was among the death victims on the 12 May 2008, earthquake disaster in China that killed over 65,000 people. Because he was in China on a business trip and that was how he met his end. My Bank management is yet to know about his death, but I knew about it because he was my friend and I am his account relationship officer, and he did not mention any Next of Kin / heir when the account was opened, because he was not married and had no children. Last week my bank management requested that Mr. Lim should give instructions on what to do about his funds, if to renew the contract or not. I know this will happen and that is why i have been looking for a means to handle the situation, because if my bank directors happen to know that he is dead and do not have any heir, they will take the funds for their personal use, so i don't want such to happen. That is why I am seeking your cooperation to present you as the Next of Kin / heir to the account, since you bear the same last name as the deceased customer. There is no risk involved; the transaction will be executed under a legitimate arrangement that will protect you from any breach of law. It is better that we claim the money, than allow the bank directors to take it, they are rich already. I am not a greedy person, so i am suggesting we share the funds in this ratio, 50/50%, i.e. Equal. Let me know your mind on this and please do treat this information highly confidential. I will give you further information as soon as i receive your reply I wait for your positive response. With Regards Dr David Roland
